rules.description: Hold 'S' for navigation mode (HJKL for arrow keys, etc.), tap for normal 'S'
Long press C/X/V to copy, cut, paste
a-mode for hjkl movement and nm enter and ui tab and ,. PageDn/Up
Hold 'R' for delete mode (UI deletes characters, JK deletes words, HL deletes lines), tap for normal 'R'
Hold 'E' for navigation mode (UI moves characters, JK moves words, HL moves lines), tap for normal 'E'
Hold 'W' for selection mode (UI selects characters, JK selects words, HL selects lines), tap for normal 'W'
q-mode for general shortcuts like browser tab navigation
